prompt: Restore default keyboard shortcuts. System Settings > Keyboard > Keyboard Shortcuts > 'Restore Defaults' button (bottom). Setup injects a custom shortcut and the eval verifies it's gone (the user-symbolic-hotkeys plist returns to baseline / loses the injected binding). Fast path: `defaults delete com.apple.symbolichotkeys && killall cfprefsd`. The eval reads com.apple.symbolichotkeys and expects the injected key 9999 to be absent.
